subtitle: 手工粗陶艺术单品

editorial.headline: 静默，是物体的呼吸。
editorial.body: 让产品不再是单纯的货架，而是一个空间的注脚。这款手工陶瓷花瓶以泥土的原始颗粒感与无序的物理波纹，静默地诉说着慢时光的故事。在黄昏折射的余晖中，它安放了空间的温度。

imagePrompts: A medium eye-level shot of artistic ceramic vase, quiet minimalist room, wabi-sabi concrete wall, warm evening light casting elegant leaf shadows, 35mm film photography, commercial product shot

An extreme close-up macro shot of artistic ceramic vase, focusing on its intricate surface texture, material grains and craftsmanship details, clean neutral background, shallow depth of field, studio lighting
A beautiful lifestyle shot of artistic ceramic vase resting on a rustic wooden table, warm and cozy aesthetic, natural daylight, soft focus background, candid lifestyle photography
